title: Define Map Properties
text: Define Map Properties Define the properties of a Map widget. Use the map widget to define areas of the user’s screen that are potentially sensitive to mouse action. To define polygons, click the >> button adjacent to the image Preview . For more information, see umap (Map) . How to Defining Map Widgets Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
